desc:
f19v 特征描述

茎与花：单茎向上螺旋弯曲。顶端开有一朵巨大的深蓝色钟形花（类似风铃草），花冠上方延伸出一个绿色的星形尖端。
叶片：茎秆上生有三个绿色的放射状星形叶簇。侧枝上长有许多细小、向下弯曲的弧形小叶。
根部：双球状块根。深褐色，由两个椭圆形的块茎上下相连组成，底部生有少量粗短的须根。

Stem & Flowers: A single stem curving upwards in a spiral. It features a large deep-blue bell-shaped flower (similar to a campanula) at the top, with a green star-shaped tip extending above the corolla.
Leaves: Three green radiate star-shaped leaf clusters grow along the stem. The side branches are covered with many small, downward-curving arc-shaped leaflets.
Roots: Double globular tuberous roots. Dark brown, consisting of two oval tubers connected vertically, with a few thick, short fibrous roots at the base.
